records.why_it_matters: Three-year real-world ETI follow-up supports durability of lung-function gains and reductions in severe disease markers.

records.why_it_matters: Longitudinal center data show that many ETI starters retain benefit but lose some peak FEV1 response, raising follow-up and adherence questions.

records.why_it_matters: Forced oscillation may detect airway mechanics abnormalities when spirometry is preserved in adults receiving highly effective modulators.

records.why_it_matters: Post-approval ETI data in young children show early improvements in sweat chloride and LCI outside trial settings.

records.why_it_matters: A Colombian cohort adds long-term ETI evidence from a setting where access and continuity can be challenging.

records.why_it_matters: Child modulator follow-up showed improved lung function and BMI without an atherogenic lipid pattern, informing metabolic monitoring.
